title: Lentil, Mango & Avocado Salad
image_alt: Lentil, mango and avocado salad with tahini dressing

items.name: shallot, thinly sliced (or 3 Tbsp onion, finely minced)

steps: Drain and rinse the lentils. Pat dry if they seem wet.
Dice the mango, avocado, tomato, and cucumber into similar-sized chunks. Thinly slice the shallot (or finely mince the onion). Roughly chop the basil.
Whisk together all dressing ingredients until smooth. Taste and adjust salt or lemon as needed — the dressing amounts are a starting point, adjust to your preference.
Combine all salad ingredients in a large bowl. Pour the dressing over and toss gently to coat.
Serve immediately — the avocado will start to brown if it sits too long.
